news:news.news:title: Hamas rejects disarmament talks, while tensions rise globally with incidents in Iran, Turkey, and Haiti.
news:news.news:keywords: Hamas disarmament talks, US blockade of Iran, Maradona retrial, Turkey school shooting, Haiti stampede investigation

news:news.news:title: The IMF warns that escalating conflict in Iran could lead to a global recession, while United Airlines considers a merger with American Airlines amid competition concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: global recession risks, United Airlines merger news, BP oil trading profits, Goldman Sachs AI risks, Texas investment incentives

news:news.news:title: Bose's latest earbuds are on sale, while Lucid expands its robotaxi partnership with Uber and Samsung raises prices on Galaxy devices.
news:news.news:keywords: Bose earbuds discount, Lucid robotaxi expansion, Samsung Galaxy price increase, Apple Amazon satellite internet partnership, AI watermarking controversy

news:news.news:title: The NBA playoffs are set to begin with predictions of a surprise champion, while the WNBA draft saw record-setting picks and notable trades.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs predictions, WNBA draft highlights, NHL division title news, MLB game summaries, sports community updates

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a rare cosmic reaction, debunking myths about Hawaiian birds, and new insights into metabolism and weight gain.
news:news.news:keywords: breakthroughs in astrophysics, debunking myths in biology, new insights into metabolism, evolutionary biology discoveries, advancements in health science

news:news.news:title: Lebanon engages in peace talks with Israel amid limited influence, while global political tensions rise with Hungary's PM's comments on Russia and Italy's PM condemning Trump.
news:news.news:keywords: Lebanon-Israel peace talks, Hungary Russia relations, Italy Trump criticism, child HIV outbreak in hospital, Harry and Meghan Australia visit

news:news.news:title: Oil prices fell below $100 a barrel amid mixed signals from US-Iran negotiations and concerns over energy market stability.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price fluctuations, US-Iran negotiations impact, Goldman Sachs AI risk awareness, Texas investment strategies, small business success stories

news:news.news:title: Daniel Moreno-Gama faces federal charges for attacking OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while Microsoft raises Surface device prices amid RAM shortages.
news:news.news:keywords: federal charges against tech CEO, electric vehicle market updates, Microsoft Surface price increase, NZXT class-action lawsuit settlement, Apple Watch Series 11 sales

news:news.news:title: The 2026 WNBA draft saw Azzi Fudd selected first overall, while UCLA set a record with five first-round picks.
news:news.news:keywords: WNBA draft highlights, UCLA basketball achievements, Dick Vitale health announcement, MLB player performances, NHL retirements

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries highlight advancements in health, environmental challenges, and new insights into human history and genetics.
news:news.news:keywords: health innovations, environmental science, human history discoveries, genetic research, wildlife conservation

news:news.news:title: Lebanon Launches Peace Talks with Israel as Oil Prices Dip Below $100 Amid Market Turbulence
